# Offline Docker Image

This folder contains a saved Docker image (raw `.tar` or split ZIP parts).

## To use on an isolated PC

### 1. Load the image into Docker
```bash
docker load -i image.tar
```

### 2. Run the container
```bash
docker run full_image_name
```
*Replace `full_image_name` with the original image tag (e.g. `user/imagename`).*
